output:
# Group Sales Response - The Westmore Hotel Dallas

**Inquiry:** Northwind Technology Summit - 80 RNs over 3 nights, mid-September
**Received:** May 9, 2026 - 9:14 AM CT
**Responder:** Group Sales Manager

---

## Email Reply (Customer-Facing)

**Subject:** Westmore Dallas - Northwind Tech Summit, Sept 14–16

Hi Rebecca,

Thank you for thinking of The Westmore for the Northwind Technology Summit. Our calendar shows good availability for the dates you mentioned (September 14 arrival, 16 departure - Mon to Wed) which lines up perfectly with our preferred Sun–Tue arrival pattern.

Here's what we're holding for Northwind:

- **Group room rate:** $169 USD/night (king rooms, includes breakfast and Wi-Fi)
- **Room block:** 80 RNs across 3 nights, attrition at 15%, cutoff Friday August 22 - 5:00 PM CT
- **Meeting space:** Westmore Grand Ballroom - 3,200 sq ft, capacity 280 theater-style - held on a tentative-first basis through May 30
- **F&B minimum:** $18,000 USD for 3 days (breakfast, two lunches, evening reception)

**Two value-adds at signing:**
1. Complimentary suite upgrade for the Northwind organizing lead
2. Welcome reception drink ticket for every attendee on Day 1

I can hold all of this for 7 business days. Want to lock dates Friday by 4:00 PM CT?

Warm regards,
Marcus Chen
Group Sales Manager - The Westmore Hotel Dallas
+1 (214) 555-0125 - marcus.chen@westmoredallas.com

---

## Internal Strategy Notes
- **Why we win this:** Dates align with our slow window (Sun–Tue), no group competition currently in-house, F&B minimum exceeds our daily floor by 35%
- **Walk-away terms:** $159 USD floor on rate, F&B minimum $14k, attrition no higher than 20%
- **Risk:** Northwind also priced at Hilton Anatole - they're $20 USD higher but 20 minutes from Convention Center

## Common Objections & Responses
| Objection | Response |
|---|---|
| "Your rate is higher than [chain]." | Our rate includes breakfast and Wi-Fi; comparable chain net rate is within $5 USD when stripped down. |
| "Attrition feels tight." | Standard for boutique Dallas; we can flex to 18% if F&B minimum lifts to $20k. |
| "We need 100% F&B exclusivity." | All meals on-property included; outside catering allowed for one off-site reception with notice. |
